# Sword of the Demon Lord
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Sword%20of%20the%20Demon%20Lord&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Sword of the Demon Lord
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = u
| desc = A Sword of the Demon Lord, Thanks to: Neva.

| rof = 80
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 370
| minDmg = 220
| maxDmg = 260
| feedp = 490
| fameb = 5

| effects = yes
| pierce = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|hp|50}} {{Stat|vit|5}}

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from The Abyss|range2 = 4.1}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
